# VBM Interior — Complete Business Overview

> VBM Interior is a Chennai-based interior design company founded in 2017 by Mohan Kumar S. With 8+ years of experience, 200+ completed projects, and a team of 30+ technical professionals, VBM Interior has grown into one of Chennai's most trusted interior design firms. We specialize in creating innovative and elegant spaces — from cozy apartments to sprawling commercial spaces. All projects include floor protection, daily site cleaning, and up to 10-year warranty with 1-year free maintenance.

## Key Facts

- **Business Name**: VBM Interior
- **Type**: Interior Design Company
- **Location**: Arumbakkam & Tambaram, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
- **Founded**: 2017 by Mohan Kumar S
- **Experience**: 8+ years
- **Projects Completed**: 200+
- **Team Size**: 30+ technical professionals
- **Warranty**: Up to 10 years (varies by package)
- **Free Maintenance**: 1 year included with all packages
- **Google Rating**: 5.0 stars (6 reviews)
- **Languages**: English, Tamil
- **Price Range**: Budget to Luxury
- **Tagline**: "PRECISION. PERFECTION.. PROMISE..."
- **Sub-tagline**: "Strong Execution. Clean Process. Long-Term Trust."

## Founder

**Mohan Kumar S** — Founder & Managing Director. Founded VBM Interior in 2017 with a vision to deliver precision-driven interior design that combines quality craftsmanship with transparent processes.

## Core Team

- **Thamizh Priya N** — Lead Designer
- **Selva Kumar B** — Project Manager
- **Gandhi M** — 3D Visualization Artist
- **Balaji S** — Client Consultant

## Mission

To transform ordinary spaces into extraordinary experiences through innovative design, exceptional craftsmanship, and personalized service.

## Vision

To be the most trusted interior design firm, known for creativity, quality, and commitment to making luxury accessible to all.

## Core Values

- **Precision** — Meticulous attention to detail in every project
- **Quality** — Excellence in every detail, from concept to completion
- **Client-Focused** — Client vision and satisfaction are top priorities
- **Trust** — Transparent processes and long-term relationships

## Services

### Living Room Design
Custom furniture selection, color scheme consultation, lighting design, space optimization, decor and accessories. We create living spaces that are both beautiful and functional, tailored to your lifestyle.

### Bedroom Design
Wardrobe design, bed and headboard selection, ambient lighting, storage solutions, luxury finishes. Transform your bedroom into a personal sanctuary with our expert design.

### Kitchen Design
Modular kitchen solutions, appliance integration, counter and cabinet design, storage optimization, ventilation planning. We design kitchens that combine efficiency with style.

### Complete Interior Design
End-to-end interior design services including space planning, material selection, project management, quality assurance, and warranty. From concept to completion, we handle everything.

### Office & Commercial Design
Workspace planning, ergonomic furniture, brand integration, meeting room design, reception area design. Create inspiring workspaces that boost productivity and reflect your brand.

### Furniture Design
Custom furniture, material selection, upholstery options, space-specific designs, quality craftsmanship. Bespoke furniture pieces designed exclusively for your space.

## Packages & Pricing

### Standard Package (5-Year Warranty)
- 2BHK: ₹3–4 Lakh
- 3BHK: ₹5–6 Lakh
- Includes: Basic modular furniture, standard laminates, essential fittings

### Premium Package (7-Year Warranty)
- 2BHK: ₹4–6 Lakh
- 3BHK: ₹7–9 Lakh
- Includes: Premium materials, upgraded hardware, enhanced finishes

### Luxury Package (10-Year Warranty)
- 2BHK: ₹7–10 Lakh
- 3BHK: ₹10–13 Lakh
- Includes: Top-tier materials, designer finishes, smart storage solutions

*All packages include 1-year free maintenance, floor protection during work, and daily site cleaning. Prices vary based on materials, design complexity, and scope. Contact us for a personalized quote.*

## Differentiators — Why Choose VBM Interior

- **1-Year Free Maintenance** — Post-completion maintenance included at no extra cost
- **Floor Protection** — We protect your existing flooring during all work
- **Daily Site Cleaning** — Clean worksite maintained throughout the project
- **Transparent Pricing** — No hidden costs, clear upfront pricing
- **Quality Materials** — Finest materials from trusted suppliers
- **Timely Completion** — Projects completed within agreed timeline
- **3D Visualization** — See your space before execution begins
- **Up to 10-Year Warranty** — Comprehensive warranty on all work

## Design Process

1. **Free Consultation** — Understanding your vision, requirements, lifestyle preferences, and budget
2. **Design Concept** — Initial design concepts with detailed 3D visualizations
3. **Planning & Material Selection** — Material selection, timeline, and cost estimation with transparent pricing
4. **Professional Execution** — Skilled execution with regular progress updates, quality checks, and timeline adherence
5. **Delivery & Warranty** — Final walkthrough, handover with documentation, and warranty activation

## Customer Testimonials Summary

VBM Interior maintains a 5.0 star rating on Google with reviews praising:
- Quality workmanship and finishing
- Professional and on-time delivery
- Understanding and executing client vision
- Reasonable pricing with exceptional results
- Reliable and professional service

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What services does VBM Interior offer?**
VBM Interior offers comprehensive interior design services including residential design, kitchen design, bedroom design, living room design, bathroom renovation, and complete home interiors. We provide end-to-end solutions from concept to completion.

**How long does an interior design project typically take?**
The timeline depends on the scope of the project. A single room redesign may take 2-4 weeks, while a complete home interior can take 6-12 weeks. We always strive to deliver on time as promised.

**Do you offer free consultations?**
Yes! We offer free initial design consultations where we understand your requirements, discuss your vision, and provide a preliminary estimate.

**What is the warranty on your work?**
We provide up to 10-year warranty depending on the package chosen: Standard (5 years), Premium (7 years), Luxury (10 years). This covers manufacturing defects, material quality, and workmanship issues. All packages include 1-year free maintenance.

**Can you work within a specific budget?**
Absolutely! We offer three packages — Standard, Premium, and Luxury — to suit different budgets without compromising on quality.

**Do you handle the complete project or just design?**
We offer end-to-end services — from initial design concepts and 3D visualization to material procurement, execution, and final installation.

**What areas do you serve?**
We primarily serve Chennai and surrounding areas including Kancheepuram, Chengalpattu, and Tiruvallur districts. We have offices in Arumbakkam and Tambaram.

**Do you provide 3D designs before execution?**
Yes, we provide detailed 3D visualizations and renderings so you can see exactly how your space will look before execution begins.

## Areas Served

We primarily serve Chennai and surrounding areas from our two offices:

- **Office 1**: Arumbakkam, Chennai
- **Office 2**: Tambaram, Chennai

### Coverage Areas
- **Central Chennai**: T. Nagar, Mylapore, Nungambakkam, Kodambakkam, Alwarpet, Egmore, Chetpet, Teynampet
- **West Chennai**: Anna Nagar, Kilpauk, Mogappair, Ambattur, Porur, Valasaravakkam, Virugambakkam, Koyambedu, Vadapalani
- **South Chennai**: Velachery, Adyar, Besant Nagar, Thiruvanmiyur, Guindy, R.A. Puram
- **IT Corridor**: OMR, Sholinganallur, Perungudi, Siruseri, Navalur, Kelambakkam
- **ECR Corridor**: ECR (East Coast Road), Neelankarai, Palavakkam
- **Suburbs**: Tambaram, Chrompet, Pallavaram, Medavakkam
- **Nearby Districts**: Kancheepuram, Chengalpattu, Mahabalipuram, Tiruvallur
